title: Finnish Thoughts on Energy Crisis 2022-2023
description: The data consists of writings in which Finns describes their experiences of the energy crisis of 2022 and 2023. In the writing call respondents were asked to describe their thoughts and feelings about the increased energy prices. A number of supporting questions were provided to help with the writing process.
